name: engifoundry-bundle
description: Structured engineering workflow for planning, execution governance, durable artifacts, review, verification, and handoff.

interface.longDescription: Use EngiFoundry to align engineering state, plan and execute structured work, preserve durable artifacts, review results, verify changes, and close out delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use EngiFoundry to align this project's engineering state.
Use EngiFoundry to plan and execute this change.
Use EngiFoundry to review and close out this work.
